name: Galactic War Progress Tracks
source: Five Parsecs from Home Core Rules - Galactic War Campaign
description: Tracks for major faction conflicts affecting the galaxy during campaign

unity_expansion.name: Unity Expansion
unity_expansion.description: K'Erin Unity forces push into Fringe Space territories

5.name: Border Skirmishes
5.description: Unity patrols increase in border systems
5.narrative: Unity warships are spotted in increasing numbers along the border worlds. Merchant traffic slows as captains avoid confrontation.

10.name: Trade Route Occupation
10.description: Unity occupies key trade routes and stations
10.narrative: Unity battlegroups seize control of major hyperspace lanes. Independent traders are forced to take longer, more dangerous routes.

15.name: Full-Scale Offensive
15.narrative: The Unity war machine is in full motion. Entire systems fall under martial law as the invasion accelerates.

20.name: Sector Conquest
20.narrative: Unity forces have consolidated control over the sector. Independent crews must flee to uncharted space or submit to Unity authority.

5.name: Rising Tensions
5.narrative: Rival corporations begin positioning assets. Security contractors are in high demand.

10.name: Proxy Conflicts
10.narrative: Corporate boardrooms wage war through hired guns. Mercenary crews can name their price.

15.name: Trade Embargo
15.narrative: Corporate fleets enforce brutal embargoes. Only the bold or desperate attempt the blockade runs.

20.name: Economic Collapse
20.narrative: The corporate war has destroyed the sector's economy. Chaos reigns as infrastructure crumbles.

alien_incursion.name: Converted Incursion
alien_incursion.description: Converted (cybernetic zealots) spread across border worlds

5.name: First Contact
5.narrative: Strange ships with biomechanical signatures appear on long-range scans. Local militias go on high alert.

10.name: Border Raids
10.narrative: Converted raiding parties strike outlying colonies, seeking technology and captives for conversion.

15.name: Full Invasion
15.narrative: Converted warfleets emerge from the void. Entire worlds face assimilation or destruction.

20.name: Sector Assimilated
20.narrative: The Converted have consumed the sector. Biological life is extinct or integrated into their collective.

pirate_uprising.name: Pirate Coalition
pirate_uprising.description: Fragmented pirate gangs unite under warlord leadership

3.name: Gang Consolidation
3.narrative: Scattered pirate gangs form alliances. Trade ships report increased harassment.

7.name: Stronghold Establishment
7.narrative: Pirate warlords claim abandoned stations as bases. The black market flourishes.

12.name: Pirate Armada
12.narrative: A unified pirate armada terrorizes shipping lanes. Merchant convoys require heavy escort.

15.name: Pirate Kingdom
15.narrative: The Pirate Coalition declares independence, carving out their own lawless empire from the chaos.

turn_advancement.description: Roll D6 each campaign turn for each active war track. On 5+, track advances by 1.

crew_involvement.description: If crew participated in mission related to this conflict, +1 to roll

major_event.description: Major story events can force progression

success_mission.description: Successfully defending against faction reduces their progress

failure_mission.description: Failed defense missions accelerate faction conquest

sabotage_mission.description: Special sabotage missions can significantly hinder faction

starting_setup.description: Start with 2 active war tracks (Unity Expansion + Corporate War recommended)

activation.description: Each turn, dormant tracks have 15% chance to activate

multiple_track_effects.description: When multiple tracks reach thresholds, effects stack
multiple_track_effects.chaos_modifier: If 3+ tracks active, all encounter rates +25%
